name: v5.17.1
body:
## Changelog
* 18ecf4e404fc746a559c853e62d3a2eca3c5e77f: update tests according to cloud templates (@tucksaun)
* 8693094e3b3c9f6447863073fa1615a621d61051: Bump go to 1.26 and update deps (@tucksaun)
* aa1114cde75d19e2dceea8159b88e990ba9a700f: Update latest available PHP version (github-actions[bot])
* edd29a83a0c8e1fb0ef43caeeee69d3df1b1a591: Update supported Upsun services (github-actions[bot])
* 0971d4ef1a0a89067bc2947fab00645661f167bf: Update deps (@fabpot)
* eef79482ffc6298eaa786a0b0f481a71723fec67: Update actions/checkout to v6 (@OskarStark)
* b62e402f64d2d62ca72289156a5e89d0aad7ed6d: add a CI job to check if tests are changing any files (@tucksaun)
* 0be304ef4ce2499791a38767f474884537965fef: Add autocompletion support for `symfony pie` (@tucksaun)
* c9e254f10983dbf153d0e8fcd47a7ef62f03fbb0: Update deps (@fabpot)
* 0ed0ac51671c698123a9972d6d4f38eca35409f7: Tweak the migration instructions (@tucksaun)
* 6a18e050c7aace1a69679504cdaa28b00c413802: Consider composer.cmd when looking for Composer on Windows (@tucksaun)
* 8a730dede032d146afc0100724d7aa035a92c0d1: fix: DEFAULT_URI should also be exposed locally (@tucksaun)
* cfd80f6821f80336361ea94407a88ccb1b04cf42: Update configuration directory name to `symfony-cli` and a warning if legacy directory is detected (@tucksaun)
* 16762b6fd4ec93770011e58ffa443bf9a6940007: prefer os specific config dirs (@tjblackheart)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/symfony-cli/symfony-cli/compare/v5.16.1...v5.17.1
